data.title: Nordicus Partners Corp appoints 3 new board members, increasing the board from 3 to 5. Henrik Keller resigns.
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California on August 7, 2025, Nordicus Partners Corporation (OTCQB: NORD), a company focused on accelerating businesses in the life sciences sector from Nordic and U.S. regions to enter the U.S. market, disclosed that Henrik Keller stepped down from the Board of Directors. The Board has expanded from three to five members, with Torben Jensen, Kim T. Mücke, and Andrew J. Ritter being named as replacements to fill the newly created vacancies on the Board.

data.title: Vestis shareholders with losses over $75,000 between May 2, 2024 and May 6, 2025 should contact Faruqi & Faruqi before August 8, 2025 - VSTS.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses exceeding $75,000 in Vestis between May 2, 2024, and May 6, 2025, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category, contact him to explore your available options.

data.title: Know Yourself Academy in Santa Barbara updates health education with interactive digital platform for kids, addressing current challenges in traditional health classes.
data.description: A digital health education platform for children, launched by Know Yourself Academy in Santa Barbara, California on August 7, 2025, aims to revolutionize health education for kids. The platform offers interactive tools to equip children with essential knowledge for ensuring lifelong wellness. This initiative addresses the limitations of traditional health education for kids and is set to transform the way young individuals are educated about health.

data.title: Nintendo showcased upcoming indie games for Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 in Indie World presentation. Launches throughout 2025.
data.description: In Redmond, Washington, Nintendo recently unveiled upcoming indie games for the Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 systems during an Indie World presentation. These games include action, adventure, mystery, and even a quirky title involving farm animals riding bikes. The showcased titles, created by independent partners, are set to release from 2025 onwards. The lineup offers a diverse range of gaming experiences suitable for both Nintendo Switch and the next-generation Nintendo Switch 2 consoles. The presentation highlighted various exciting games, promising diverse and engaging gameplay for players.

data.title: EU banking regulator mandates 1,250% risk weight for unbacked cryptocurrencies in draft rules for banks holding Bitcoin, Ether.
data.description: Draft rules have been finalized by the European Banking Authority, mandating banks to allocate a risk weight of 1,250% to unbacked cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin and Ether.

data.title: Adams County's inaugural Poet Laureate, Kerrie Joy, hosts final event 'Unstudied Adams County' with a theme 'Fashion is the Future' at Anythink Wright Farms.
data.description: In Thornton, Colorado, Kerrie Joy, the outgoing Poet Laureate of Adams County, will conclude her two-year term by hosting a final event at Anythink Wright Farms. The event, part of her Unstudied Adams County series, will be an interactive celebration of poetry and creativity with the theme ‘Fashion is the Future.’ Attendees are urged to dress according to their unique style. The event aims to bring the community together and explore the intersection of fashion and literature.
